clusters.leadHeadline: Padres Sale Shatters MLB Record at $3.9B Valuation
clusters.summary: Clearlake Capital cofounder's acquisition marks highest MLB team valuation ever. Deal signals continued growth in sports franchise values driven by private equity.

clusters.leadHeadline: Kansas City Approves $600M Royals Stadium Funding Plan
clusters.summary: MLB team secures major public funding commitment for new facility. Club still needs to finalize remaining financing to complete stadium project.

clusters.leadHeadline: WNBA's New CBA Forces Liberty Stars Into Salary Restructuring
clusters.summary: Revised collective bargaining agreement limits max player signings, forcing teams to reduce compensation. Liberty Stars taking pay cuts to maintain competitiveness.

clusters.leadHeadline: NFL Draft Sees Six Teams Trading for Multiple First-Round Picks
clusters.summary: Giants acquire 10th pick from Bengals in weekend trade, highlighting active offseason player acquisition. Draft class reshapes quarterback market dynamics.

clusters.leadHeadline: NFL Mulls 18-Game Schedule Expansion; Flacco Warns of Playoff Risks
clusters.summary: Veteran QB Joe Flacco raises concerns about playoff integrity under expanded regular season. NFL continues evaluating schedule changes with labor implications.
